title: CITY OF GRESHAM POLICE DEPARTMENT - 211info
text: CITY OF GRESHAM CITY OF GRESHAM POLICE DEPARTMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Municipal police for the City of Gresham. 1333 NW Eastman Parkway Gresham, OR 97030 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours / 7 days a week Police Lobby Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-6pm Email (503) 618-2318 - 8- 1-6 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 618-3000 Main phone (503) 823-3333 Non-Emergency Police (503) 618-2373 Utility Billing Main phone (503) 618-2318 Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-6pm Police Non-Emergency (503) 823-3333 Police, Fire, and Stolen Vehicles Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Cities of Fairview, Gresham, Troutdale, and Wood Village, and unincorporated east Multnomah County Services: Municipal Police Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - CITY OF GRESHAM COMMUNITY PLANNING AND PUBLIC WORKS - HOMELESS CAMP REPORTING COMMUNITY PLANNING AND PUBLIC WORKS - LIVABILITY TEAM COMMUNITY PLANNING AND PUBLIC WORKS - RENTAL HOUSING INSPECTION PROGRAM CONSUMER ASSISTANCE AND PROTECTION - LAW ENFORCEMENT COMPLAINTS LEGAL ASSISTANCE MODALITIES - EAST COUNTY RESOLUTIONS UTILITIES - UTILITY FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge.
